title: Institutional Memory Skill Execution Root
description: Non-runnable feature container for introducing seeded shared memory files, backend-specific memory skill instructions, allowlist wiring, validation, and review under one coordinated execution root.
acceptance_criteria: `docs/memory/known-issues.md` exists with at least 4 seeded recurring-pitfall entries.
`docs/memory/conventions.md` exists with at least 4 seeded convention entries.
`.claude/skills/memory/SKILL.md` and `.agents/skills/memory/SKILL.md` both exist and describe required reads, append-only writes, and role-based write restrictions.
`memory` is added to the agent skill allowlist so supported agents receive it in isolated execution roots.
Automated validation confirms the skill is bundled correctly and the existing test suite passes.
